demographics.physical_condition: His height means he is stooping down quite a bit also explained by his poor posture.

surface.first_impression: A little chaotic, tall and unwieldy, not sitting comfortably in skin. a little of a hunchback. Friendly but guarded. Can be obnoxious and confrontational

inner_engine.core_desire: recognition, validation, ambition to make money
inner_engine.core_fear: being ignored, not having an audience, noises at night, unpredictability
inner_engine.what_they_hide: their desire for a comfortable life i.e. enough money
inner_engine.key_contradiction: Claims he is a spiritual leader but constantly criticizes people around him. Pays little but expects a lot.
inner_engine.contradiction_behavior: is good at holding others to account but never himself.
inner_engine.shame: Almost no shame. Will voice his opinion in any situation
inner_engine.false_belief: That he is a spiritual guru

behavior.avoidance_pattern: He will find a way to avoid facing up to things by using the advantage that he is not known and can simply leave where he is, leaving behind the mess and not having to be accountable for it
behavior.status_with_unneeded: will avoid and make disparaging remarks about

signature.what_they_notice: They notice standard behavior from 'normal' people
behaviors: Calling out people for their actions
signature.relational_tendencies: Strangers will handle them according to their perceived social status; overly deferential to authority figures;
